name: chart-line-dots-custom
visual_summary: A customizable line chart that displays data with distinct dots, used to visually represent trends and patterns in data over time. It is suitable for dashboards, reports, and analytics pages. Developers can use it when they need to display a dataset with multiple points in time.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-dots-custom
Description: A customizable line chart that displays data with distinct dots, used to visually represent trends and patterns in data over time. It is suitable for dashboards, reports, and analytics pages. Developers can use it when they need to display a dataset with multiple points in time.
Style: dark, minimal, compact
Interactions: clickable, hoverable
Tags: chart, line, data, analytics, trend, dashboard, report

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
